ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of the form (e.g., 8-K, 10-Q) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the form */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the form */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the form was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the form was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the form (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the form being filed */,
  "received_date" TEXT /* Date the filing was received */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the submitted document */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the filing */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the filing */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the filing was approved */,
  "submission_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the filing */,
  "is_late" INTEGER /* Indicates if the filing was submitted late */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., compliance officer, finance manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing associated with this status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the filing (e.g., Submitted, Approved, Under Review) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_status_status_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_status_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing the notification relates to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_history_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated filing */,
  "amount" REAL /* Penalty amount incurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date the penalty was assessed */,
  "paid_date" TEXT /* Date the penalty was paid */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the penalty has been paid */,
  "paid_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who paid the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_paid_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("paid_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing associated with this attachment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "uploaded_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_uploaded_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing associated with the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the filing */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the versioned document */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_versions_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_bodies" (
  "body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory body */,
  "body_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body (e.g., SEC) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the regulatory body */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the regulatory body */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_body_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship record */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing */,
  "body_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_body_relations_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_id") REFERENCES regulatory_bodies ("body_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_body_relations_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)
